name: Wholesale Customer Registration Form Setup
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Add a Wholesale Registration Form to your Webstore Menu"}], "data-id": "1"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Your wholesale form is available by default but is hidden in the system. To access your form:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your browser address bar, go to "}, {"text": "https://www.yoursite.com.au/_myacct/wholesaleregister", "code": true}, {"text": ", replacing "}, {"text": "yoursite", "bold": true}, {"text": " with your actual domain name."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "So customers can register as a wholesaler you will need to add a link to the form in your menus. In your Neto control panel, navigate to "}, {"text": "Webstore", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Menus", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "web_header", "bold": true}, {"text": " will appear on the top menu of every page on your website."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "web_footer", "bold": true}, {"text": " will appear on the footer menu of every page on your website."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Choose the menu you would like the registration form link to appear on."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Add New Menu Item", "bold": true}, {"text": " button, name it "}, {"text": "Wholesale Registration", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Under "}, {"text": "Select URL for menu item", "bold": true}, {"text": " select "}, {"text": "Link to a URL", "bold": true}, {"text": ", paste the form link and press "}, {"text": "Accept", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/WholesaleCustomerRegistrationFormSetup1.05T5g00000txJCdEAM.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/WholesaleCustomerRegistrationFormSetup1.05T5g00000txJCdEAM.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "image1", "width": 700, "height": 249}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Drag the newly created menu item and drop it to a suitable menu category. In this example, we've added it under "}, {"text": "Service", "bold": true}, {"text": " in the web_footer. Click "}, {"text": "Save", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/WholesaleCustomerRegistrationFormSetup2.05T5g00000txJDREA2.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/WholesaleCustomerRegistrationFormSetup2.05T5g00000txJDREA2.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "image2", "width": 700, "height": 247}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Customers will now be able to register for a wholesale account, and you will revive email notifications when someone submits the form."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Edit your Wholesale Form"}], "data-id": "2"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Wholesale Terms"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Wholesale registration forms can dynamically add your terms and conditions through a content zone. By default, the terms content zone on your form is "}, {"text": "wholesale_terms", "code": true}, {"text": ". To create and populate this content zone:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your control panel, navigate to "}, {"text": "Webstore", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Content zones", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Add new content zone", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In the "}, {"text": "Zone Name / ID", "bold": true}, {"text": " enter "}, {"text": "wholesale_terms", "code": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Add your terms to the "}, {"text": "Content", "bold": true}, {"text": " section usign the source code, or WYSIWYG editor."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Save & close", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Your wholesale form now displays the terms and conditions from the content zone."}]}, {"type": "p",
